en_title: The Grand Tour Returns in September With Its New Trio of Hosts
cn_title: 《The Grand Tour》九月回归，新主持阵容亮相
subtitle: 老牌汽车节目换挡重启
opus_summary: Prime Video确认《The Grand Tour》将于9月4日回归，共6集并走访安哥拉、马来西亚和加州。节目由Throttle House搭档与火车迷网红Francis Bourgeois接棒主持。

paragraphs.en: Prime Video has announced the next season of The Grand Tour will air on September 4. As previously reported, the series is resuming with a new set of hosts . The air date confirmation came via a set of social media posts leaning into their arrival with an apt and admittedly on-brand slogan: “Same show. New knobs.”
paragraphs.cn: Prime Video宣布，《The Grand Tour》新一季将于9月4日播出。正如此前报道，节目将由一组新主持人接棒回归。官方通过一系列社交媒体帖子确认播出日期，并用一句贴合节目风格的口号迎接他们：「还是那个节目，换了几个新家伙。」

paragraphs.en: The Grand Tour will return with a six-episode series, which will visit a variety of locations, from the Angolan desert, to Malaysia, and also California. Hosting duties will be handled by Thomas Holland and James Engelsman – an existing duo from successful motoring YouTube channel Throttle House – and social media personality Francis Bourgeois. Holland is a motoring journalist who launched Throttle House in 2015, and was joined on the channel by Engelsman a few years later. Francis Bourgeois (whose real name is Luke Nicolson) is a qualified mechanical engineer who briefly worked at Rolls-Royce before leaving to pursue his popular social media profile based on his trainspotting hobby. Former host Jeremy Clarkson made an appearance on The Grand Tour’s social channels in February in a brief skit to reveal the new hosts.
paragraphs.cn: 《The Grand Tour》回归季共6集，将造访多个地点，从安哥拉沙漠到马来西亚和加利福尼亚。主持工作由成功汽车YouTube频道Throttle House的固定搭档Thomas Holland、James Engelsman，以及社交媒体名人Francis Bourgeois担任。Holland是一名汽车记者，2015年创办Throttle House，几年后Engelsman加入频道。Francis Bourgeois本名Luke Nicolson，是一名合格的机械工程师，曾短暂供职于劳斯莱斯，后来离职经营以观火车爱好为主题的热门社交媒体账号。前主持人Jeremy Clarkson今年2月曾在节目社交账号的一段短剧中亮相，揭晓新主持阵容。

paragraphs.en: The Grand Tour is Prime Video’s most-watched unscripted UK series, although it’s been off the road since September 2024, following the final episode to feature original hosts Clarkson, Richard Hammond, and James May. The trio wrapped up over two decades of TV collaborations between them with a mega trip across Zimbabwe and Botswana.
paragraphs.cn: 《The Grand Tour》是Prime Video观看人数最多的英国无剧本节目，但自2024年9月播出原主持人Clarkson、Richard Hammond和James May最后一次共同出镜的那集后，节目便一直停驶。三人以一场横跨津巴布韦和博茨瓦纳的大型旅程，为超过20年的电视合作画上句号。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上通过@mrlukereilly找到他，向他询问各种事情。
